hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.ts || "$FILE" == *.tsx || "$FILE" == *.js || "$FILE" == *.jsx ]]; then cd "$(dirname "$FILE")" && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ -n "$FILE" ]]; then grep -qE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|password\s*=\s*["\x27][^"\x27]{4,})' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && echo "WARNING: Potential hardcoded secret detected in $FILE" || true; fi
